Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration Pursuant To Section 5 6 Of The Cassie Mae Gainer Trust Of April 1 2013 And To Stay The Pending Action
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Continued To Dec-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Robert Gainer.
David Simon for and with Barbara Gainer (Trustee).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 26, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 3, 2019. The remaining issues in the Petition for an Accounting and Distribution of Trust, the First Amended for Settlement and Approval of First Account, etc. and the Petition to Compel Binding Arbitration, etc. are continued to and the Parties are to return on December 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-14-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-14-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon for and with Barbara Gainer.
Dennis Vann for and with Robert Gainer.

Mr. Simon stated that they hired a fiduciary accounting service (Ms. Hamilton), that Ms. Hamilton prepared a new amended accounting, that the Appraiser is no longer returning phone calls, that he filed a response to the original objections and that he can file his petition within four weeks. Mr. Vann stated that this has been pending for over one year, that he is concerned about damages to the trust, that the trustee occupies the property and is the only one who has access to the house, and that she is not paying rent. Mr. Vann also stated that the trustee is not bonded despite the fact that the instrument did not waive bond, that there is one minor beneficiary, that there are two beneficiaries in college and need their money, that over $400,000.00 was paid to an individual to renovate the house, that there are no receipts from this individual and asked that no additional fees be paid without a Court order. Mr. Simon stated that attorney fees are being paid, that the house is worth more than one million dollars and that he does not see what Mr. Vann is worried about. The Petition for Settlement and Approval of Account, etc., and the Petition for an Accounting and Distribution of Trust Assets are continued to June 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting is to be filed by June 5, 2019. The Court will consider what else can be done if the matter is unable to proceed at that time. Mr. Simon stated that there is a breakdown in communication with Mr. Vann. The Court encourages the parties to communicate and figure out how to get this resolved.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Continued To Nov-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for and Robert Gainer.
David Simon for and with Barbara Gainer (Successor Trustee).
Karen Gainer in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that there is still an outstanding requirement of Ms. Gainer to account by August 28, 2018. Mr. Simon stated that he was given an accounting yesterday by an Accountant, that the accounting needs some Attorney work and requested a completion deadline 30-45 days out. Status on filing of the Trustee's first account and the Petition for an Accounting and Distribution of Trust Assets are continued to November 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The accounting is to be completed and the petition for approval is to be filed by October 23, 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Oct-09-2018 Continued To Nov-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Trustee'S First Account
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Oct-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with (petitioner) Robert Gainer. Barbara Gainer also present. Karen Gainer Lawrence also present.

The Court stated that an order had been issued for an accounting to be completed by August 8, 2018 but that nothing has been filed. Mr. Vann reported that he received a binder with receipts and checks, that Ms. Gainer had tried to file it with the court but it was rejected and that he has sent her a sample of an accounting to submit to her accountant. Ms. Gainer reported that she gave a binder to each of the beneficiaries, that the one she tried to submit for filing was rejected, that her accountant is currently on vacation, that she prepared a summary but the court rejected that as well. The Court stated that Ms. Gainer should obtain an attorney who understands the requirements of the court and that her accountant needs to understand the probate rules. Ms. Gainer stated that they are at a point to resolve the trust but that she will hire an attorney which will spend more of the trusts money. Ms. Lawrence stated that she wants the issues resolved and that her sister needs an attorney. The Court stated that a mediator could be beneficial but that they need to get through the accounting and that the issues should be able to be flushed out and dealt with. Ms. Gainer asked if the court needed the bank statements. The Court stated that it cannot be her lawyer or accountant, that she needs to obtain professional help and that she needs to follow the legal strictures. The status on filing trustee's first account and the Petition for an Accounting and Distribution of Trust Assets was continued to October 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Oct-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Continued To Sep-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Robert Gainer.

Mr. Vann stated that he never got a signed order instructing the Trustee to account, so the Trustee has not been served. The Court signed the order granting the Petition for Trust Accounting. Ms. Gainer is to file an accounting on or before August 28, 2018. The remaining bifurcated issues are continued to September 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of Trustee's first account is also set for September 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-06-2018 Continued To Jul-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann for Robert Gainer (Beneficiary).
Karen Gainer Lawrence also present in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that the Trustee (Barbara) is not present. Mr. Vann stated that he has not received any communication from her. Ms. Lawrence stated that she is here in support of the petition. Mr. Vann stated that Barbara has been properly served and that it is best to request approval of the accounting. The Court orders that the Trustee file an accounting by July 18, 2018. The Court also bifurcated the remaining issues and continues the matter to July 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
